title: NotificationDeliveryConfig
description: Shape of preferences.json `notifications.delivery`. Per-channel opt-in config for fanning queued Notification entries out to external sinks (Slack/Discord/generic webhook/email). SECURITY: this object holds only the NAMES of environment variables that carry secret endpoints (webhook_url_env, url_env, smtp_env) plus non-secret toggles and addresses — never a literal URL or token. nyann reads the actual endpoint from the named env var at delivery time so secrets never land in preferences.json.

webhook_url_env.description: Name of the env var holding the Slack incoming-webhook URL (e.g. NYANN_SLACK_WEBHOOK). NOT the URL itself.
Name of the env var holding the Discord webhook URL (e.g. NYANN_DISCORD_WEBHOOK). NOT the URL itself.

webhook.description: Generic webhook channel — POSTs the raw notification JSON.

url_env.description: Name of the env var holding the target webhook URL (e.g. NYANN_WEBHOOK_URL). NOT the URL itself.

email.description: Email channel via local sendmail or a curl SMTP relay.

smtp_env.description: Name of the env var holding the SMTP relay URL (e.g. NYANN_SMTP_URL, smtp://user:pass@host:587). Optional — when unset and `sendmail` exists, delivery uses sendmail. NOT the URL itself.
